name: HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos - Fondo de Inversion HMC Multifamily US Fund
summary: HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos - Fondo de Inversion HMC Multifamily US Fund invests in multifamily residential properties in the United States. HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos manages the fund. The fund's objective is to generate income and capital appreciation through investments in a diversified portfolio of US multifamily properties.
